title: Trace order state transitions
description: Replay an order's recorded transitions to find illegal jumps or a stuck state.
body: Use when an order is in an unexpected or stuck state. Actions: read the order's transition history, replay it against the allowed state graph, and report any illegal edge or a state that stalled past its threshold (for example paid but never fulfilled). Do not force a status change without first tracing how the order reached its current state. This skill is read-only and must not mutate order state without permission. Validation signals include a transition timeline with the offending or stalled step identified. Risk boundary: a money-affecting recovery (refund, re-charge) must defer to business.finance under a human gate.
